summary: Excellent‑sounding rare electric Deep Elem performance captured on a high‑quality recording, though only a single set is present.
review: The reviewer describes the audio as “so dang good,” calling the release perfect and praising the rare electric Deep Elem. No technical flaws are mentioned, but they note that a second set would have been welcome, indicating the source contains only one set of material.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review highlights both superb sound quality and an outstanding performance, but limited data (one review) lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer emphasizes the recording sounds “so dang good” with no noted issues; suggests a clear, well‑balanced capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only one set is available; reviewer wishes for a second set, implying the existing material flows well but feels incomplete.
